div.div: 各脅威 ID は THR--<区分>-<連番> (例: THR-SECRETS-I-001 = Secrets Information Disclosure 1 番) で 11 ファイルに格納

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 990px; margin-left: 562px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 各ファイル: 40_脅威モデル_STRIDE/11_tier1_.md / 外部連携 20_external_*.md / tier 境界 30_tier_boundary_*.md / データ層 40_data_*.md

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1778px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1023px; margin-left: 62px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: PR チェックリスト (IMP-POL-STR-044): 6 区分ぶんのチェックボックス全て必須、該当なしは "理由記載"。STRIDE ファイル未更新 PR は CI で block。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1778px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1048px; margin-left: 62px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 各脅威には 残余リスク状態 (Accepted / Monitored / Under mitigation) を明示。Under mitigation の 1 年放置を年次レビューで検知し受容判断に遷移させる。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1778px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1073px; margin-left: 62px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 対応 ADR: ADR-POL-001 / ADR-SEC-001 (Keycloak) / ADR-CICD-003 (Kyverno) / NFR-E-RSK-001 (STRIDE) / DS-SW-COMP-141 (多層防御統括)
